description: Preview a palette in use as VB semantic roles. Reads colors from a descendant <color-palette> or <palette-generator> and renders one preview card per role with per-pairing WCAG chips. Editing happens upstream in the palette; this component is a preview + theme CSS exporter.

attributes.name: colors
attributes.description: Comma-separated hex palette (fallback when no <color-palette> or <palette-generator> child).

attributes.name: roles
attributes.description: Comma-separated roles in assignment order. Valid: primary, secondary, accent, success, warning, error, info. Default: "primary,secondary,accent".

attributes.name: show-export
attributes.description: Show Copy Theme CSS / Copy JSON toolbar.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Optional heading label above the previews.
